channel.title: AI Tools Review
channel.description: Honest, in-depth reviews of AI tools

item.title: AI Agents Complete Guide 2026 — GPT, Claude, Open Interpreter: Which Is Best?
item.description: The definitive 2026 comparison of AI Agents: GPT Agents, Claude Computer Use, Open Interpreter, AutoGPT, and Devin. Features, pricing, and real-world use cases explained.

item.title: 7 Best AI Writing Tools for SEO in 2026 (Ranked by Results)
item.description: Tested 12 AI writing tools for SEO in 2026. Here are the 7 that actually move rankings—ranked by output quality, keyword control, and real ROI.

item.title: 7 Best AI Tools for Freelancers in 2026 (Ranked by ROI)
item.description: The 7 best AI tools for freelancers in 2026—ranked by actual ROI, not hype. Save 10+ hours/week and land higher-paying clients.

item.title: What Is RAG? Retrieval-Augmented Generation Explained for Business 2026
item.description: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) explained clearly: how it works, RAG vs fine-tuning, 5 best free tools (LangChain, LlamaIndex, ChromaDB), and how to get started for your business.

item.title: Claude vs ChatGPT for Business 2026: Which AI Is Worth Paying For?
item.description: Claude vs ChatGPT for business in 2026—a no-fluff comparison of features, pricing, and real-world performance. Find out which AI model actually grows your revenue.
